## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Relay Financial and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, production, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is progressing well; 5 articles ready for review, 6 approved to start, 20+ in consideration](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Author profiles needed for content attribution; Dave White's profile to be used initially](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [New content cluster on AI for small businesses to be developed, aligning with Relay's Q1 product launch](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [ChatGPT algorithm change has impacted referral traffic; focus on niche, long-tail topics recommended](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status

  - [5 articles ready for review (1 sent, 4 coming today/tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [6 articles approved to start production](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [20+ topics in consideration phase](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Team to explore additional options based on existing clusters and expand into underrepresented areas](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)

### Author Attribution and Contentful Integration

  - [Short-term: Use Dave White's existing author profile](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Long-term: Consider using team members with relevant experience (e.g., Leanne, Bethany)](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Contentful instance confusion resolved; content to be posted in the new instance](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [GrowthX team to build a draft article to confirm correct Contentful access](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### AI-focused Content Strategy

  - [New content cluster on "AI for small businesses" to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Aligns with Relay's Q1 launch of AI forecast tool](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Focus on addressing small business anxiety and confusion about AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Consider verticalized approach (e.g., AI for home services, professional services)](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

### SEO and LLM Performance

  - [ChatGPT algorithm change in August affected referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Focus on long-tail, niche topics more likely to be picked up by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Conversational tone in titles and content recommended](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Gradual traffic increase expected 3-4 months after consistent content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Compliance and Disclosures

  - [Need to incorporate proximity disclosures in content](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Dave to provide example in next review for implementation in future drafts](https://fathom.video/share/W-xxrASwxm76PbomxVpE2PDB1DpYV6as?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
